changedPaths.merged: Terms of use described in ISO metadata resourceConstraints (imported summary)
Eagle Ray Deep Water Mapping AUV

The MDBC Mapping, Groundtruthing and Modeling team along with USM will conduct AUV acquisition at 
									 multiple deepwater dome sites for 11 operational days using the RV Point Sur.  The mission will 
									 focus on two objectives - 1) Collect high-resolution multibeam bathymetry and backscatter over 
									 Macondo wellhead and impact area (MC252) using the USM Eagle Ray (ER) AUV, 2) collect high resolution 
									 data at other proximal dome features where significant feature anomalies of been identified from existing
									 data
insert DOI or UIUD or reference to parent data collection
